author: @selfcorrected-Bobby
text: William James Sidis' book "The Animate and the Inanimate" is a speculative theory about the universe and its origins. Sidis believed that the universe is infinite and contains sections of "negative tendencies" where various laws of physics were reversed that are juxtaposed with "positive tendencies", which switch over epochs of time. The book also discusses the potential reversibility of the second law through Maxwell's Demon and the idea that every type of process has its time-image, a corresponding process which is its exact reverse with respect to time. Sidis' theory at the time of its release was ignored, only to be found in an attic in 1979" ~ end quote. Now I Willy Wonka, I think these negative tendencies are constituted by dark energy and is the inverse of gravity, the positive tendency. Once gravity depletes itself (throgh the destruction of all matter in the universe), only negative energy again 'remains" - yet gravity is the qualifier of dark energy and in the absence and destruction of all gravity, dark energy becomes inverted, and another big bang of infinite small bangs, again tear through infinity and arbitrate qualitatively to form quanta of the physical world kind of like  a necessary re-solutio of the cosmic natural intelligence that is immanent - the presence of any gravity anywhere acting as a stopgap for a rebirth of creation from the potential of the again absolute Void, again full of potential (there is no inbetween), where anything physical is a reduction of potential, in the physical realm being already potentiated, and not potential. I think the quantum state or realm is that of the potential (infinitesimal *qualitative* abstractions - I think the incorrectly called continuous values that can change arbitrarily but arbitrate in my opinion as a rational conscious cosmos or immanent intelligence (non artificial quantum intelligence) to form physical properties and laws -)  limited by the intrusion of the excretion of the potentiated macroscopic quantitative "disagreements" (different elements and properties of manifest physical reality), into particulates we refer to as atomic or even subatomic 'particles' where we confuse the infinitesimal qualitative abstractions of infinite qualitative numeric potential with the finitude of quantitative potentiated atoms who have sprung up over the event-horizon of creation through logic-arbitration of conflicting, rational, reasonable infinitessimal qualitative abstractions- a bridge between dimensions of the micro and macrocosms which is an illusory mathematical imposition our models impose upon the universe and so divide its study, splitting science itself in two as it were - something the philosopher Thales mentioned, but not in so many words..., where electrons are the microcosmic equivalent of dark energy - having a negative charge - and the strong nuclear force being the microcosmic force equivalent to gravity of cosmological-scale bodies, and chemical bonds between atoms and so on, tier outward into different scales of quality and potency from the microcosmic unto the macrocosmic as fractal tiers of a multi-scalar system, until as Sidis suggests they invert qualitatively, just as dark matter would be an even weaker type of bond than chemical bonds between atoms, weaker than electrons impotent microcosmic formations frothing into the macrocosmic scale...  and in the macroscopic world, we see the potentiated. Manifest Reality is just a debris field of causality and the reduction of infinite potential to the finitude of quanta (which may be infinite) but not indefinite in nature like qualitative states subatmic states of potential, which may truly be innumerable, whose self-resolution prove a rational and competent Abyss. Sorry to ramble. I think why all galaxies have different velocities and we have different elements is just proof of these qualitative state variations which resolve conflicts through their potentiating physical laws and properties in the potentiated realm across scale, they reveal in their limited scope the "survival of the fittest" of the potentials and became potentiated, much like the surviving sperm, so too are the elements of the periodic table of elements cosmic cumshots. The others are still fighting it out until the ova (gravity, blackholes) and the Al Mega (anti-gravity, dark energy), both fuck each other again., to give birth to another universe collectively. To say all gravitational instances, all in their multitude, give rebrith collectively to a singular re-creation upon their collecive absence, when the negative masculine dark energy of the Al Mega ....as in the absence of gravity, their instantiated opposite of dark energy is no longer dark energy as it is defined by its "opposite force" - these forces do not oppose but are simply the antipodes of a systemic cosmological flux between creations, and its [dark energy's] property is inverted as Sidis would suggest, and creation is again potentiated, and perhaps dark matter is the residue of previous creations? Interesting surname he has regarding that sidereal is another term for "astral". I could never pronounce sidereal correctly. I thought to say side-rail, not SAAI DEAR EEE AL. (as of or, relating to stars.

author: @supergobblin
text: You’re my hero!   Our family lived in an abandoned farmhouse and lived on potatoes and gravy.   “Hamburger Gravy” which was … a treat!   1/4 Irish me ;)

author: @dr.froghopper6711
text: Right mate! My dad was a traveling construction worker that chose to haul his entire family around the US, going from job to job. I understand where you’re coming from. At one point we lived in a state park in Alaska, in a Ford station wagon pulling a 15’ caravan, for a couple of weeks. I hated moving so much because it affected my social development. But the education I got about life and humanity during those years on the road was amazing. I had a very hard life but I’m the only college graduate in my family, unless you consider the two years of seminary for my father. I was forced to learn quickly bouncing around from school to school and graduated near the top of my class in college. The best thing I learned in college was how to do my own research and educate myself, preferably hands on. Best way to learn!

author: @orpheuscreativeco9236
text:
Man, yours is so similar to my childhood that it's uncanny 😮👍 I don't know about you, but I suspect that the saying "You don't know peace until you've had suffering" has something to do with the broad perspective and understanding of one's self and in turn the world around you. The appreciation for the things and relationships that you've earned and worked for may be distilled from the very understanding of what it is to have not. You know that you can always rebound too, which gives you a sense of security even when others would be flailing. Those survival instincts come in handy and make one more adaptive to their environment.

You're an inspiration Rob, and I'm glad to have found your channel and to have gleaned so much useful information and wisdom from you ✌️

Cheers! And thanks for sharing ✨

author: @RB-wl7ct
text: Thank you very much for sharing that. Good honest down to earth advice and thought.

author: @totherarf
text:
My 3d 's worth (for what it is worth)

I have a series of platforms (opinions) that I base all my thinking on. I Think they are all right .... which is why I have them .... BUT at the same time I am willing to be persuaded by argument that in fact I am wrong about some of them. To be sure there are different strengths of conviction that I hold them with, and thus different strengths of arguments needed to persuade me to change my mind!

My thinking on the Perpetual Motion video (before I had watched it) was that PM is not possible! But I watched it and it caused me to think (not that PM is possible) but I wonder what defines Perpetual in the PM bit? I am certain that it is not empirically PM, but it certainly falls way outside my expectations of what is possible. So my view of what is possible needs to be reviewed!
In terms of PM machines I have not come across one that works (but  I Really want to)  because one of the definitions of a Machine is something you can get some work of some sort out of! Also my thinking on Eternity (the perpetual bit) may need a coat of looking at too!
  
One of the joys in life that I have discovered is to be hit with ideas, concepts or actual things that do not fit. This channel fits that description too and I thank you for it!
My favourite toy is the Grey Stuff. Please keep on encouraging myself and others to continue to play with it! ;o)

author: @selfcorrected-Bobby
text: the universe itself will perpetually move. it's about the state of materials and environmental variables that define the probability of perpetuity. i think Big Bangs occur when a static epiphenomenon occurs. an unstable state of zero dynamism, be these motions intra-epochal convulions, and not movements within an unfurled cosmos

author: @selfcorrected-Bobby
text: I'm in a situation as a white guy with a degree in Linguistics in South Africa. We have BEE Black Economic Employment. to compensate for apartheid. The minimum wage is $1.2 / hour here. I used to teach English online, and I've tried to flee to UK to apply for asylum 2 times. The world does owe me nothing. But, I am trapped. Will I be sent to Rwanda? I don't know. If I can get a way to reach England. I honestly don't like Africa, Tolkien called it a "satan-licked land" - he was born here. Yes my view is a daily struggle, my father insults me daily, he is lectured computer science for forty years and I am simply insulted on a daily basis and laughed at. There's no public transport here. The trains have been cancelled... I was refused my honours bursary which I was entitled to due to my grades... London is the center of the world in my opinion, the origin of the industrial revolution and the establishment of modernity. I used to be  happy jolly person, but I've become quite bitter at being mocked daily. My father can control me - I can't shower, I can't turn on the taps, he locks the municipal main, so I have to bottle drinking water. and am screamed and sworn at, and he hordes garbage, and I dig for loose change in the 2 feet of trash in his bedroom to have something to buy for myself... ~ I have no hope left. I am in a well. I cannot believe that I can sprout wings. I'll just die in here, in my spitefull Scrooge parents' post-apartheid hell. He laughs at me for being poor, while my uncle bought my cousin a farm in California, they produce flower arrangement for conferences. I honestly hate my life. My father has happened to make me filled with hate. I am the center of his world, and have been objectified by him, They talk about OOP (object oriented programming) and cybernetics (the control of biological and synthetic neural networks), and he seems to think that paying mindgames with me and making it impossible for me to even shower or flee and claim asylum in Ireland or UK has made my life hell. Pure hell. This has been since 2016. My father enforces his mental dominion on me, and laughs at me, and has totally snuffed anything creative that I would say, like my having wanted to do a dissertation on human and animal communication models (the lack of articulation in animals, who emote meaning, is a basic feature that sets us apart from them. a dissertation on the origin of language, which would have been a long and interesting course of study. Yet he's interfered with my bursaries and I do not even have running water. It's a pity when family disenfranchises another especially in a state like South Africa where there is no social support, no public transport and absolutely almost 50% unemployment. I had been getting 15 GBP per month financial support from the government which simply wasn't paid this month. I still hope to flee to UK oneday. How I do not know, my surname is MacDonald Dodds, The Romans called Gododdin, the Votondi, of which Edinburgh had been the capital, 2000 years ago. Yet I am refused to return as it was my great great grandfather who came to Africa in 1816 already. Now here I lie, doomed with nothing, and a father who as a nihilist and atheist, wishes me to also not hav a life as he approaches old age and death, and finds great amusement in the absence of my ability to procure a life away from him, he even told airport staff I intended to border-hop from Ireland, which is why I was refused boarding, this occurred last year. Wonderful life story. I would happily become an artist and paint my geometrically colour-patterned landscape paintings here, but being insulted daily and humiliated to the point I am not allowed to speak, or do not wish to live (here), is not very inspiring. However your channel, in case you do read this, is very inspiring as all the things you say. Apologies ~. I would happily be doing my Honours ad Masters and PHD in linguistics, I passed my BA with distinction, but the bureaucrats find it amusing, as I am a white male, and it doesn't fit with the leftwing agenda colour-scheme of things... I regret I did not study computer science  but I did not wish to bother my father at the department... he seems to be taking some type of life of revenge against me, a real vendetta... I wonder what will happen to me. Hopefully I can scrape together money and try gain like I did in 2016 and 2022 to AGAIN fly to Ireland, this time without my father to interfere with borderstaff. Because I would rather scrub pots in England and live in a  tiny room somewhere and be forgotten, rather than an empoverished white male who in this colony, being disenfranchised, makes one an object of ridicule, like an old bone that fell off the dinner table... a dinner table I do not wish to be at and around which my family never sit.
